name: Avatar Studio
description: HeyGen-style avatar video production pipeline: create persistent avatars (from a prompt or your own photo), clone voices with ElevenLabs, and produce lip-synced talking-head videos via FAL OmniHuman. Install the fal-avatar, elevenlabs-voice, openai-tts, video-composer and ffmpeg-guide skill templates first (the Studio UI setup does this automatically), then assign a provider/model to the three agents.
author: AT

variables.description: FAL.ai API key — used for avatar image generation and OmniHuman/InfiniTalk lip-sync video.
ElevenLabs API key — voice cloning + TTS. Optional: openai-tts is used as fallback when unset.
OpenAI API key — fallback TTS voiceover (gpt-4o-mini-tts).
